Title: Create a new price list
Preconditions: Admin logged in to Backend
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{BACK_URL}} Pricing module > Price Lists
[ACT] Click 'Add' button
[ACT] Enter price list name
[ACT] Select currency USD
[ACT] Click 'Create' button
Assertions:
[STATE] New price list is created and visible in list
[DOM] Price list name appears in Price Lists table
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ADMIN] Verify price list persists after page refresh
[API] GET /api/pricing/pricelists — confirm new entry exists
Failure_Signals: Price list not created; 'Create' button unresponsive; name not reflected in list
Cleanup: delete created price list via Admin

Title: Add pricelist with different Min qty > Check list/sale price in Cart
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend and Storefront
Product1 configured with tiered pricing:
- qty=1: ListPrice=349.00 / SalePrice=210.00
- qty=4: ListPrice=100.00 / SalePrice=N/A
- qty=10: ListPrice=88.00 / SalePrice=69.00
Test_Data: product_sku={{TEST_SKU}}; tier1_list=349.00; tier1_sale=210.00; tier4_list=100.00; tier10_list=88.00; tier10_sale=69.00
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}} and open Product1 ({{TEST_SKU}})
[ASSERT] Verify list/sale price shows $349/$210 per item
[ACT] Add 1 product to cart
[ASSERT] Verify list/sale price = $349/$210; discountAmount = $349-$210 = $139.00
[ACT] Set qty = 4 in cart
[ASSERT] Verify list stays $349 but actual price = $100; discountAmount = ($349-$100) × 4 = $996.00
[ACT] Set qty = 10 in cart
[ASSERT] Verify list stays $349 but actual price = $69; discountAmount = ($349-$69) × 10 = $2800.00
Assertions:
[MATH] Step 1: list=$349.00, sale=$210.00 per item on PDP
[MATH] Step 2: cart qty=1, discountAmount=$139.00
[MATH] Step 3: cart qty=4, placedPrice=$100.00, totalDiscount=$996.00
[MATH] Step 4: cart qty=10, placedPrice=$69.00, totalDiscount=$2800.00
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] GraphQL xAPI cart query — inspect items[].placedPrice, items[].discountAmount, items[].listPrice at each qty step
Failure_Signals: Wrong tier price applied; math rounding errors; discount calculated on wrong base price

Title: Discount stacking — coupon applies to sale price not list price
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend and Storefront
Product_1 has list price = $100 and sale price = $70
Coupon code SAVE10 configured for 10% discount
Price list assigned to store with product_1
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}} as logged-in customer
[ACT] Add Product_1 ({{TEST_SKU}}) to cart (qty=1)
[ASSERT] Verify cart shows sale price $70.00 as the line item price (not $100.00)
[ACT] Apply coupon code SAVE10
[ASSERT] Verify discount amount in cart
[ACT] Execute xAPI cart query and inspect items[].placedPrice and items[].discountAmount
[MATH] Calculate expected: discount = 10% of $70 = $7.00 (NOT 10% of $100 = $10.00)
[ASSERT] Verify items[].extendedPrice = $63.00
Assertions:
[STATE] Cart line item placedPrice = $70.00 (sale price)
[MATH] Coupon discount = $7.00 (10% of $70, NOT $10.00 off list price)
[MATH] extendedPrice = $63.00
[STATE] Discount stacking order: sale price first, then coupon on sale price
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GraphQL xAPI cart query — inspect items[].placedPrice, items[].discountAmount, items[].extendedPrice
[NETWORK] Cart update request HTTP 200
Failure_Signals: Discount calculated on list price ($10 instead of $7); extendedPrice = $60 instead of $63; placedPrice shows list price

Title: Discount stacking — sale + tier + coupon all three layers
Preconditions:

- List price = $200
- Sale price = $150
- Tier price: qty >= 10 triggers price $120 per unit
- Coupon SAVE20 configured for 20% discount
Price list assigned to store
Test_Data: product_sku={{TEST_SKU}}; list_price=200.00; sale_price=150.00; tier_qty=10; tier_price=120.00; coupon_code=SAVE20; discount_pct=20
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}} as logged-in customer
[ACT] Add Product_1 ({{TEST_SKU}}) to cart with qty = 10

[ACT] Apply coupon code SAVE20
[ACT] Execute xAPI cart query and inspect items[].placedPrice, items[].discountAmount, items[].extendedPrice
[MATH] Calculate expected: placedPrice = $120; discount = 20% of $120 = $24 per unit; extendedPrice = 10 x ($120 - $24) = $960.00
[ASSERT] Verify cart.subTotal and cart.total are mathematically consistent
Assertions:
[STATE] placedPrice = $120.00 (tier price at qty >= 10)
[MATH] Coupon discount per unit = $24.00 (20% of tier price $120)
[MATH] extendedPrice = $960.00 for the line
[STATE] All three discount layers stack correctly: sale → tier at threshold → coupon on tier price
[MATH] cart.subTotal and cart.total reflect correct stacked discounts

[API] GraphQL xAPI cart query — inspect subTotal, total, items[].extendedPrice, items[].discountAmount
[NETWORK] All cart update requests HTTP 200
Failure_Signals: Any layer not applied; math errors in discount stacking; cart total inconsistent with line item totals

[ACT] Execute xAPI cart query and inspect cart.taxTotal
[MATH] Calculate expected: taxTotal = 10% of $80 = $8.00
[ASSERT] Verify taxTotal is $8.00 (NOT $10.00 pre-discount tax)

[MATH] Before coupon: taxTotal = $10.00 (10% of $100)
[MATH] After coupon: subtotal = $80.00; taxTotal = $8.00 (10% of $80)

Title: Tax recalculates when coupon is removed
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend and Storefront
Product_1 has price = $100
Tax rate = 10% configured for shipping address region
Coupon FLAT20 applied to cart ($20 discount)
Cart currently shows taxTotal = $8.00
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}} cart with coupon FLAT20 already applied
[ASSERT] Verify current state: subtotal = $80; taxTotal = $8.00
[ACT] Remove coupon code FLAT20 from cart
[ACT] Execute xAPI cart query and inspect cart.taxTotal
[ASSERT] Verify subtotal reverts to $100.00
[MATH] Calculate expected: taxTotal = 10% of $100 = $10.00
[ASSERT] Verify taxTotal recalculated to $10.00
Assertions:
[STATE] After coupon removal: subtotal = $100.00
[MATH] taxTotal recalculates to $10.00 (10% of $100)
[STATE] Tax base correctly reverts to pre-coupon amount
[STATE] No stale tax amount from discounted calculation
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GraphQL xAPI cart query — inspect taxTotal after coupon removal
[NETWORK] Cart update request HTTP 200
Failure_Signals: taxTotal stays at $8.00 after coupon removal; stale tax cached; subtotal not reverting to $100

Title: Tax base uses post-tier-pricing amount
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend and Storefront
Product_1 has list price = $50
Tier price: qty >= 10 triggers price $35 per unit
Tax rate = 8% configured for shipping address region
Tax calculation enabled for store
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}} as logged-in customer
[ACT] Add Product_1 ({{TEST_SKU}}) to cart with qty = 10
[ACT] Proceed to checkout and set shipping address to taxable region
[ASSERT] Verify placedPrice = $35 per unit (tier price applied)
[ACT] Execute xAPI cart query and inspect cart.taxTotal
[MATH] Calculate expected: line total = 10 x $35 = $350; taxTotal = 8% of $350 = $28.00
[ASSERT] Verify taxTotal = $28.00 (NOT $40.00 which would be 8% of list-price total $500)
Assertions:
[MATH] Line total = $350.00 (10 x $35 tier price)
[MATH] taxTotal = $28.00 (8% of $350)
[STATE] Tax base uses post-tier-pricing amount
[STATE] taxTotal is NOT $40.00 (8% of list-price total $500)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GraphQL xAPI cart query — inspect taxTotal, items[].placedPrice, items[].taxTotal
[NETWORK] All cart and checkout requests HTTP 200
Failure_Signals: Tax calculated on list price total ($40 instead of $28); tier price not applied; tax base not reflecting tier price
